claim: Retrieval augmented generation can improve factual reliability.
Large language models can generate unsupported or hallucinated claims.
Grounding model answers in retrieved evidence can reduce unsupported generation.
Retrieval augmented generation always eliminates hallucinations.
Large language models are always reliable when trained on small biased datasets.
Retrieving documents guarantees that every generated claim is correct.
Retrieval augmented generation is cheaper than every parametric language model in every deployment.
All large language models use the same retrieval architecture.
LLM judges are more accurate than human experts in every professional domain.
